# archaic.ArchaicResult { #tspaint.archaic.ArchaicResult }

```python
tspaint.archaic.ArchaicResult(
    posteriors,
    burden,
    mu,
    sd,
    A,
    pi0,
    loglik_history,
)
```

Result of :func:`detect_archaic`.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**posteriors**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`), [float](`float`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per sample, contiguous ``(left, right, P(archaic))`` over the genome.

<code>[**burden**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [float](`float`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per sample, the span-weighted mean ``P(archaic)`` (the genome-wide archaic burden).

<code>[**mu, sd**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(2,)`` learned emission means / stds on log-depth (index 0 modern, 1 archaic).

<code>[**A**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(2, 2)`` learned per-breakpoint transition matrix.

<code>[**pi0**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(2,)`` learned initial distribution.

<code>[**loglik_history**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Pooled Baum–Welch log-likelihood per iteration (non-decreasing).

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [tracts](#tspaint.archaic.ArchaicResult.tracts) | Merged archaic tracts ``[(left, right)]`` where ``P(archaic) >= threshold``. |

### tracts { #tspaint.archaic.ArchaicResult.tracts }

```python
tspaint.archaic.ArchaicResult.tracts(sample, threshold=0.5)
```

Merged archaic tracts ``[(left, right)]`` where ``P(archaic) >= threshold``.
